'''Mirrix''' was one of the wives of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Sha-Mar Ma-dred]] of [[Kashir]]. 

Before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|clone wars]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and his master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] were sent to a meeting with [[Sha-Mar Ma-dred|King Sha-Mar Ma-dred]]. As the jedi approached the king, Mirrix and the other wives ([[Tiarri]], [[Kheann]] and [[Ashala Ma-dred|Ashala]]) were present.

The wives left before the meeting to do as they wished. That night she heard as [[Tiarri]] screamed "[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|An Intruder]]". [[Kheann]] and Mirrix pushed [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin]] to the ground and took out they're knives.

[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin]] explained that someone stole his [[Anakin Skywalker's first lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. [[Kheann]] implied to Anakin that it was [[Ashala Ma-dred|Ashala]] and Mirrix told him that [[Ashala Ma-dred|Ashala]] is in the next room.
